prompt: A luxury skincare serum bottle on a white marble surface, macro lens locked close, single overhead light source casting a razor-precise shadow that anchors the product to the surface, dry air — no atmospheric haze — hyper-realistic glass and liquid refraction catching the light, minimal and premium feel, 16:9. Create this as a simple low-resolution thumbnail-style cinematic still for a prompt library card. Keep the composition clean, readable at small size, realistic, uncluttered, with strong silhouette and clear focal subject. No text, no interface chrome, no split panels, no collage.
negative_prompt: text overlay, UI chrome, collage, split screen, diptych, triptych, watermark, logo, illegible details, extra objects, cluttered composition, cartoon, illustration, low-detail mush, deformed product, distorted vehicle, duplicate objects

settings.lighting: clean, readable, high-contrast lighting suited for a small homepage card
settings.camera_angle: match the prompt framing with a single clear subject
settings.depth_of_field: moderate depth of field for thumbnail readability
settings.quality: clean edges, realistic materials, readable at small size
